content.text: Generate an image of Microsoft logo.

output.revised_prompt: Create a high-resolution, clean, vector-style image of the Microsoft logo centered on a white background. Include the four-square symbol composed of four equal-sized squares arranged in a 2x2 grid with colors: top-left red (#F25022), top-right green (#7FBA00), bottom-left blue (#00A4EF), bottom-right yellow (#FFB900). To the right of the symbol, place the wordmark "Microsoft" in Segoe UI Regular (or a very close geometric sans-serif), medium gray (#737373), properly spaced and aligned vertically with the symbol. Flat, crisp edges, no texture, minimal or no drop shadow, generous whitespace, scalable/vector feel. Output should be centered and high resolution suitable for print and web (clean edges, sharp colors).
